description: Currency & Medical Tracker — real-time green/yellow/red currency dashboard with legality determination

hard_stops.label: Pilot Not Current for Flight
hard_stops.logic: Pilot attempting flight without required currency — hard stop with specific 14 CFR citation

hard_stops.label: Medical Certificate Expired
hard_stops.logic: Pilot's medical certificate has expired per 14 CFR 61.23 duration rules

soft_flags.label: Currency Expiring Within 30 Days
soft_flags.logic: One or more currency requirements will lapse within 30 days

soft_flags.label: Night Currency Low
soft_flags.logic: Pilot has only 2 of the required 3 night takeoffs and landings in the preceding 90 days

soft_flags.label: Instrument Currency Expiring
soft_flags.logic: 6-month instrument currency window is closing — approaches, holding, intercepting, and tracking requirements at risk

soft_flags.label: Flight Review Due Within 60 Days
soft_flags.logic: Biennial flight review per 14 CFR 61.56 is due within 60 days
